summary: Good audience-sourced tape with a bit of echo captures a strong second set featuring standout versions of Peggy‑O, Queen Jane and a rare Standing > Sugar Magnolia > Lucy in the Sky combo.
review: The show rocks overall – after a rough start on “Here Comes Sunshine” the band settles into a slow‑burn first set highlighted by fantastic takes on “Peggy‑O” and “Queen Jane,” then erupts on the second set with a rare and superb Standing > Sugar Magnolia > Lucy in the Sky sequence. The recording is an audience capture with noticeable room echo, putting it just shy of pristine but still very listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review praises the musical performance (strong show quality) while noting modest recording issues; the combined assessment yields a high‑mid rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: A bit too much echo and room ambience audible, but overall clear enough to enjoy the performance.

standout_songs: Standing > Sugar Magnolia > Lucy in the Sky
show_quality.setlist_flow: Ragged opening on “Here Comes Sunshine” gives way to a slow‑burn first set that builds momentum, culminating in a second‑set surge with rare song combinations and high energy.
